quotes.verbatim_quote:
Picking is a habit. Habits are hard to break but not impossible. The
longer you have been playing, the harder it will be to change.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Frames the entire method as habit-formation/replacement, explaining why advanced players struggle most to adopt the system.

quotes.verbatim_quote:
The
key is repetition. Do not overanalyze your right hand movements. After a short
time, these strokes will become second nature.
quotes.why_load_bearing: States the practice principle: drill until automatic, do not introspect mid-stroke.
